bird.summary: The tepui swift (Streptoprocne phelpsi) is a species of bird in subfamily Cypseloidinae of the swift family Apodidae. It is found in Brazil…

locations.name: 巴西

locations.name: 圭亚那

relations.subject: Tepui swift
relations.evidence: The species is found in humid montane and lowland forests, montane grasslands, and around cliffs
relations.object_summary: 大型猛禽和食腐鸟偏好的高崖栖息环境。

relations.subject: Tepui swift
relations.evidence: The species is found in humid montane and lowland forests, montane grasslands, and around cliffs
relations.object_summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

relations.subject: Tepui swift
relations.evidence: No immeditate threats have been identified. It is considered uncommon to fairly common, and "[a]t least in the short term, human activity probably has little effect on Tepui Swift, although it may be vulnerable in the long term to deforestation"
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
